summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of P0 Reports feature (AR Aging, Sales Report, Expense Report). All 34 backend tests pass (100%). All frontend flows verified via Playwright - all three report tabs load with correct data and all interactions work correctly.

issues: 'Largest Category' KPI card shows multi-word value (e.g., 'Purchase Payment') that wraps to two lines at 2xl font-bold. Minor cosmetic but consistent with app style.

critical_code_review_comments: AR Aging: branch_id validation correctly returns 403 for non-existent/unauthorized branches (security by design via get_branch_filter). This is correct behavior.
Sales Report date filter: Changes to date_from/date_to are correctly applied when 'Run Report' is clicked; auto-fires on load via useEffect/useCallback dependency array.
ReportsPage.js is 844 lines - consider splitting ArAgingReport, SalesReport, ExpenseReport into separate component files for maintainability (no functional impact).
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Used existing data: AR Total ~₱46,672.50 (9 customers), Sales Total ~₱58,260 (26 transactions, 5 categories), Expenses Total ~₱65,651 (18 transactions, 6 categories).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports feature is fully tested and working. Backend: 3 endpoints (/api/reports/ar-aging, /api/reports/sales, /api/reports/expenses) all return correct data with proper auth. Frontend: /reports page with tabbed navigation (tab-ar-aging, tab-sales, tab-expenses), KPI cards, data tables, date filters, Run Report buttons, print functionality all work correctly. AR Aging supports expandable rows per customer showing invoice detail. Expense Report has category filter dropdown. No bugs found.

verified_features.reports_nav_link: PASS - Reports link visible in sidebar at /reports with BarChart3 icon, perm: reports.view
verified_features.ar_aging_tab: PASS - loads with KPI cards (₱39,172.50 current, ₱4,500 31-60d, ₱3,000 61-90d, ₱0 90+d, ₱46,672.50 total), 9 customer rows
verified_features.ar_aging_row_expansion: PASS - clicking row expands invoice details with invoice number, date, days old, balance
verified_features.ar_aging_branch_filter: PASS - All Branches dropdown visible for admin
verified_features.sales_report_tab: PASS - KPI cards show ₱58,260 total, ₱41,020 cash, ₱17,240 credit, 5 categories
verified_features.sales_date_filters: PASS - date_from/date_to inputs found and working
verified_features.sales_summary_view: PASS - Sales by Category table with 5 categories, amounts, percentages, cash/credit breakdown + Daily Sales table
verified_features.sales_transactions_view: PASS - 26 transaction rows with invoice#, date, customer, cashier, type, amount, paid, balance, status
verified_features.expense_report_tab: PASS - KPI cards show ₱65,651 total, 18 transactions, 6 categories, Purchase Payment as largest
verified_features.expense_date_filters: PASS - date_from/date_to work (narrow date 2026-02-21 gives ₱41,600, full month gives ₱65,651)
verified_features.expense_summary_view: PASS - Expenses by Category table with progress bars showing share percentage
verified_features.expense_detail_view: PASS - 18 expense transaction rows with date, category, description, employee, recorded_by, amount
verified_features.backend_ar_aging: PASS - 200 OK, returns as_of_date, totals (current/b31_60/b61_90/b90plus/total), rows with invoice detail
verified_features.backend_sales: PASS - 200 OK, returns grand_total=58260, 5 categories, 26 transactions, payment_totals, daily breakdown
verified_features.backend_expenses: PASS - 200 OK, returns grand_total=65651, 6 categories, 18 expenses, daily breakdown
